Package javalibs

Class FileUtils

javalibs.FileUtils

Since:
6/5/15

  • Method Details

    • get

      public static FileUtils get()
      Get an instance
      Returns:
      javalibs.FileUtils object

    • sep

      public String sep()
      Get the file separator for the OS this system is running on
      Returns:
      The separator string

    • fexists

      public boolean fexists(String pathToFile)
      Determine if a file already exists
      Parameters:
      pathToFile - The path to the file
      Returns:
      True if the file exists, else false

    • getWorkingDir

      public String getWorkingDir()
      Get the current working directory
      Returns:
      The path to the current working directory

    • checkAndCreateDir

      public void checkAndCreateDir(String dirName)
      Create a directory if it doesn't exist
      Parameters:
      dirName - Path to the directory

    • lineCount

      public long lineCount(String filePath)
      Get the number of lines in a file
      Parameters:
      filePath - the path to the file
      Returns:
      number of lines, -1 if error

    • readFullFile

      public String readFullFile(String filePath)
      Read a file in as a string
      Parameters:
      filePath - The path to the file
      Returns:
      The file, as a string, if it's found and read successfully

    • readLineByLine

      public List<String> readLineByLine(String filePath)
      Read a file line by line
      Parameters:
      filePath - The path to the file
      Returns:
      A list of lines of the file (as strings) if file is found and readable

    • getAllFilePathsInDirWithPrefix

      public List<String> getAllFilePathsInDirWithPrefix(String prefix, String path)
      Returns a list of absolute file paths to files in a directory that start with the supplied prefix
      Parameters:
      prefix - The prefix string that a file should match with
      path - The path to the directory containing the files
      Returns:
      The list of absolute paths, empty list if nothing matching in the directory

    • getAllFilePathsInDir

      public List<String> getAllFilePathsInDir(String path)
      Returns a list of absolute file paths to files in a directory
      Parameters:
      path - The path to the directory
      Returns:
      The list of absolute paths, empty list if no files in the directory

    • deleteFile

      public boolean deleteFile(String pathToFile)
      Delete a file if it exists. If the file does not exist this will return true. Note, if the file cannot be deleted this eats the security exception and returns false.
      Parameters:
      pathToFile - The path to the file to be deleted
      Returns:
      True if the file does not exist at the end of the function, else false

    • deleteDir

      public boolean deleteDir(String pathToDir)

    • getAllFileObjectsInDir

      public List<File> getAllFileObjectsInDir(String path)
      Returns java File objects for all Files in a directory
      Parameters:
      path - Path to the directory
      Returns:
      The list of File objects, empty list if no files in the directory

    • writeNewFile

      public boolean writeNewFile(String fileName, String str)
      Write a new file to disk. Will overwrite existing file
      Parameters:
      fileName - Path to the file
      str - The string to write to the file
      Returns:
      True if written successfully, else false

    • appendToFile

      public boolean appendToFile(String filename, String str)
      Append data to an existing file
      Parameters:
      filename - Path to the file
      str - The string to write to the new file
      Returns:
      True if appended successfully, else false

    • splitOnChar

      public String[] splitOnChar(String str, char splitChar)
      Split a string on a character
      Parameters:
      str - The string to split
      splitChar - The character to split over
      Returns:
      Both sides of the string

    • getBufferedReaderForBZ2File

      public BufferedReader getBufferedReaderForBZ2File(String filePath)
      Get a BufferedReader capable of reading a BZ2 compressed file line by line
      Parameters:
      filePath - Path to file
      Returns:
      The BR, null if exception

    • getBufferedReaderForGZIPFile

      public BufferedReader getBufferedReaderForGZIPFile(String filePath)
      Get a BufferedReader capable of reading a GZIP compressed file line by line
      Parameters:
      filePath - Path to file
      Returns:
      The BR, null if exception

    • getBufferedReaderForZipFile

      public BufferedReader getBufferedReaderForZipFile(String filePath)

    • changeModTime

      public boolean changeModTime(String path, String newModTime)
      Change the modification time of a file
      Parameters:
      path - Path to file to modify
      newModTime - Mod time in string format MM/dd/yyyy
      Returns:
      True if modification time was set successfully, else false
